# Support

## How to Get Help

### Documentation

- **README**: See the [project README](https://github.com/cisco-ai-defense/langchain-cisco-ai-defense#readme) for installation, configuration, and usage.
- **Examples**: Browse [examples/](https://github.com/cisco-ai-defense/langchain-cisco-ai-defense/tree/main/examples) for end-to-end middleware samples.
- **Cisco AI Defense SDK**: The underlying SDK is documented at [cisco-ai-defense/ai-defense-python-sdk](https://github.com/cisco-ai-defense/ai-defense-python-sdk).

### Reporting Bugs

Found a bug? [Open an issue](https://github.com/cisco-ai-defense/langchain-cisco-ai-defense/issues/new?template=bug_report.md) with steps to reproduce, versions, and error output.

### Requesting Features

Have an idea? [Open a feature request](https://github.com/cisco-ai-defense/langchain-cisco-ai-defense/issues/new?template=feature_request.md).

### Security Issues

**Do not open public issues for security vulnerabilities.** Use [GitHub's private reporting](https://github.com/cisco-ai-defense/langchain-cisco-ai-defense/security/advisories/new) or email [oss-security@cisco.com](mailto:oss-security@cisco.com). See [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md).
